meaning: vt.[化]使成碱性v.[化](使)碱化,(使) 成碱性
examples: The name of his book, "Alkalize or Die", is in itself a marketing scare tactic.
You don't need any other book on pH once you have Alkalize or Die in your library.
Now, instead of explaining for hours how to balance their pH, I tell them "Alkalize or Die" and offer the book.
